repo_native_mobile_design_skill.details: Added repo-scoped skill files under `.agents/skills/native-mobile-design/` using the current OpenAI Codex skill layout (`SKILL.md`, optional `references/`, optional `agents/openai.yaml`). The skill focuses native UI work on SwiftUI / Kotlin-native APIs, system components, restrained typography, and the local trade-tauri visual direction. Revalidated with `git diff --check -- AGENTS.md .agents/skills/native-mobile-design/SKILL.md .agents/skills/native-mobile-design/references/platform-and-style.md .agents/skills/native-mobile-design/agents/openai.yaml`.

repo_agents_native_mobile_ui_guidance.details: Root `AGENTS.md` now includes a `Native Mobile UI` section that directs Codex to use the `native-mobile-design` skill, prefer native platform APIs and system components, keep most authored typography restrained, and avoid messy or over-customized native UI by default. Revalidated with `git diff --check -- AGENTS.md`.

ios_root_chat_route_hashable_conformance.details: `PresentedChatRoute` still conforms to `Hashable` in `ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift` after the root chat presentation refactor, and `xcrun swiftc -parse ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift` still passes.

ios_root_level_chat_route.details: Fixed the latest standalone iOS app-shell chat presentation regression exposed by `Saved Messages` from `Settings`. `ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift` still keeps a single root `PresentedChatRoute`, but the route now flows through an always-mounted `RootChatPresenterBridge` sibling of the `TabView` instead of a SwiftUI overlay that could mount without visibly presenting. `RootChatPresenterController` now presents `ChatConversationController` full-screen from the actual root/key-window presenter, so chats can open from any tab without depending on the current tab stack or a nested view layer. `ChatsRootView` rows and the settings `Saved Messages` row both still reuse `coordinator.openChat(...)`, and `ChatConversationController` still dismisses through the injected close callback. Revalidated with `xcrun swiftc -parse ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift`, `git diff --check -- ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift`, and `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO`.

ios_root_chat_presenter_bridge.details: `AppRootView` now mounts `RootChatPresenterBridge` as an always-mounted sibling above the tab shell, and `RootChatPresenterController` now falls back to `UIApplication`'s key window when resolving the presenter so a pending root chat can still present before the bridge view is attached to a window. The bridge also logs `makeUIViewController`, `update`, `viewDidLoad`, `deferPresent`, `flushPending`, and `present` to make the next `Saved Messages` repro unambiguous. Revalidated with `xcrun swiftc -parse ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift`, `git diff --check -- ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift`, and `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO`.

native_app_icon_assets.details: Added a real iOS `AppIcon` asset catalog under `ios/App/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset`, registered it in `ios/Vibe.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj`, generated Android launcher icons from `ios/App/logo.PNG` into `android/app/src/main/res/mipmap-*`, and updated `android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml` to use `@mipmap/ic_launcher` plus `@mipmap/ic_launcher_round`. Revalidated with `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-app-icon-ios` from `ios/` and `/Users/mohammadshayani/.gradle/wrapper/dists/gradle-8.14.3-bin/cv11ve7ro1n3o1j4so8xd9n66/gradle-8.14.3/bin/gradle -p android :app:assembleDebug --offline` from repo root.

ios_saved_messages_route_logging.details: Expanded the Xcode-console route logging for the still-broken standalone iOS `Saved Messages` path. `ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift` now logs the root presenter bridge lifecycle (`makeUIViewController`, `update`, `viewDidLoad`, `deferPresent`, `flushPending`, `present`, `dismiss`, and `handleClose`) plus `ChatConversationController` `viewWillAppear`/`viewDidAppear`/`viewDidLayoutSubviews`/`viewDidDisappear`/`didMove(toParent:)`, post-`applyRoute` surface configuration, row-source counts, chat-channel open snapshots, and live view/mainView geometry. `ios/Sources/App/SettingsView.swift` still logs the settings-row tap, and `ios/ChatModule/ChatEngine.swift` still logs chat-channel open/join behavior including the `saved_messages` realtime-skip path. Revalidated with `xcrun swiftc -parse ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift` and `git diff --check -- ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift`.

ios_saved_messages_realtime_and_safe_are.details: Fixed the next standalone iOS follow-up where `Saved Messages` was still being treated like a realtime Phoenix chat. `ios/ChatModule/ChatEngine.swift` now refuses to create realtime demand or join a native chat topic for `saved_messages`, keeping that path HTTP-only, while `ios/ChatModule/ChatListView.swift` sharply reduces the top/bottom wallpaper edge overlays and disables the extra blur that was reading as safe-area bands. `ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift` also hides the tab bar background again and `ios/Sources/App/SettingsView.swift` now lets the native settings host extend through the container safe areas. Revalidated with `xcodebuild -quiet -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-saved-messages-safe-area-fix` from `ios/`.

ios_chat_push_route_and_settings_spacing.details: Fixed the latest standalone iOS follow-up regression where pushed conversations were incorrectly forcing `ChatMainView` into standalone profile mode. `ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift` now keeps the pushed conversation controller in normal chat mode, ignores the unsupported profile/agent header actions in the standalone shell, restores `Saved Messages` to the same real chat route, hides the extra SwiftUI navigation-bar chrome on the root settings page, and aligns the tab/root bar backgrounds with the app palette. `ios/Sources/App/SettingsNativeComponents.swift` also reduces the oversized bottom/footer spacing in the native settings host. Revalidated with `xcodebuild -quiet -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-chat-layout-fix` from `ios/`.

ios_native_chat_route_restoration.details: Restored the standalone iOS shell to the real native chat surface instead of the placeholder conversation route. `ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift` now pushes chat rows and `Saved Messages` into `ChatMainView`, `ios/Sources/App/SettingsView.swift` routes `Saved Messages` through the same chat route, and `ios/project.yml` / `ios/Vibe.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj` now compile the reusable `ios/ChatModule/` sources directly into the app target. The pass also removed Expo-only base-class usage from `ChatListView.swift` and `ChatMainView.swift`, restored the native image/video edit payload modules, added `ios/ChatModule/LottieCompat.swift` plus sticker fallbacks so the target builds without the missing Lottie dependency, reused `ChatAvatarURLResolver` in `ChatMainView.swift`, and switched `ChatPhoenixClient.swift` to the iOS-safe SOCKS proxy dictionary keys already used by `PacketRuntime`. Revalidated with `xcodebuild -quiet -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-native-chat-route-7` from `ios/`.

ios_settings_old_native_host_restore.details: Replaced the standalone iOS settings root SwiftUI recreation with the old native host pattern. `ios/Sources/App/SettingsView.swift` now uses `SettingsNativeMainViewRepresentable`, and `ios/Sources/App/SettingsNativeComponents.swift` now hosts the avatar outside the scroll view, keeps the hero spacer inside the scroll content, and forwards `scrollViewDidScroll` into `setScrollOffset(...)` like the legacy native settings module. Revalidated with `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-settings-old-host` from `ios/`.

ios_settings_followup_avatar_row_alignme.details: Fixed the latest standalone iOS settings follow-up issues. `ios/Sources/App/SettingsNativeComponents.swift` now hosts the UIKit row inside a full-width container and applies stronger trailing-edge hugging/compression priorities so the chevron and toggle stay aligned on the right edge, while `ios/Sources/App/SettingsView.swift` now overlays the reused morphing avatar above the scroll view with a hero spacer underneath so the avatar responds to scroll like the old native settings host. The `Saved Messages` row now routes back to the main Chats page instead of pushing the placeholder conversation screen. Revalidated with `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-settings-fix-2` from `ios/`.

ios_settings_rows_avatar_morph_fix.details: Fixed the standalone iOS settings regression where section cards could render as empty space. `ios/Sources/App/SettingsNativeComponents.swift` now gives the native settings row wrapper an intrinsic height plus `sizeThatFits`, applies a stable minimum row height inside the card, and swaps the simplified avatar header for the reused legacy morphing avatar implementation driven by the settings scroll offset. Revalidated with `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-context-resume` from `ios/`.

ios_shell_settings_home_parity_pass.details: Patched the standalone iOS shell to match the old native/RN structure more closely. `ios/Sources/App/AuthViewController.swift` now saves the login key silently and posts a short in-app toast instead of showing the key during auth, `ios/Sources/App/SettingsView.swift` now uses the old settings row model with profile editing, QR/key views, appearance, media cache, and no root subtitles, and `ios/Sources/App/AppRootView.swift` plus `AppRuntimeController.swift` now use the legacy light/dark palette, shared inline top headers, reusable new-chat flow, and empty/list states for chats, contacts, and calls. Revalidated with `xcodebuild -quiet -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-ios-shell-parity-2` from `ios/`.

ios_auth_header_matches_resolo_settings.details: Adjusted `ios/Sources/App/AuthViewController.swift` so the auth sheet header uses the same plain SwiftUI navigation treatment as the local Resolo settings modal: `NavigationStack`, inline title, leading close button, and a unified sheet/content background instead of the earlier custom toolbar tint that created a visible top edge mismatch. Revalidated with `xcodebuild -quiet -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-auth-header-fix` from `ios/`.

mobile_welcome_auth_refresh.details: Refreshed the native welcome/auth entry flow on both platforms. On iOS, `ios/Sources/App/AuthViewController.swift` now hosts the sign-in/sign-up flow in a Resolo-style SwiftUI sheet with a standard navigation bar, floating inputs, stock close control, and default sheet chrome, while `ios/Sources/App/WelcomeViewController.swift` removes footer blur, shortens the welcome copy, darkens the background toward near-black, and tightens the metal light beam. `ios/Sources/Home/ChatHomeViewController.swift` now reuses the same modal API for auth recovery. On Android, `android/app/src/main/java/com/mohammadshayani/vibe/ui/AuthActivity.kt`, `WelcomeActivity.kt`, and `ChatHomeActivity.kt` share the same bottom-sheet auth presenter and welcome flow. Revalidated with `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-welcome-refresh-3 CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build` from `ios/` and `/Users/mohammadshayani/.gradle/wrapper/dists/gradle-8.14.3-bin/cv11ve7ro1n3o1j4so8xd9n66/gradle-8.14.3/bin/gradle -p android :app:assembleDebug --offline`.

ios_auth_welcome_resolo_followup.details: Adjusted the iOS auth and welcome visuals again after comparison with the local Resolo native app. `ios/Sources/App/AuthViewController.swift` now uses the Resolo auth palette and control geometry with a large plain sheet instead of the earlier medium detent, and `ios/Sources/App/WelcomeViewController.swift` now uses a warmer multi-glow metal backdrop so the top-right beam remains visible in both light and dark appearances. Revalidated with `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-auth-welcome-followup CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build` from `ios/`.

mobile_native_repo_split.details: Moved the remaining native implementation out of `mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/`. Reusable Swift source/resources now live under `ios/ChatModule/`, reusable Kotlin source/resources now live under `android/chat-module/`, and the Expo bridge wrappers/package metadata now live under `legacy/mobile-rn/modules/vibe-chat-native/`.

ios_native_build_no_npm.details: Ran `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator -derivedDataPath /tmp/vibe-native-ios-final CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build` from `ios/`. The build succeeded after the native repo split and produced `/tmp/vibe-native-ios-final/Build/Products/Debug-iphonesimulator/Vibe.app`. The only notable output was deprecation warnings for `adjustsImageWhenHighlighted` and `showsTouchWhenHighlighted` in `ios/Sources/Home/ChatHomeCardCell.swift`.

android_native_build_no_npm.details: Ran `/Users/mohammadshayani/.gradle/wrapper/dists/gradle-8.14.3-bin/cv11ve7ro1n3o1j4so8xd9n66/gradle-8.14.3/bin/gradle -p android :app:assembleDebug` outside the sandbox so Gradle could fetch the missing Android plugin. Fixed Kotlin compile issues in `android/app/src/main/java/com/mohammadshayani/vibe/home/ChatHomeService.kt` and `android/app/src/main/java/com/mohammadshayani/vibe/ui/ChatHomeActivity.kt`, then re-ran successfully and produced `android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk`.

server_connected_app_bridge_tool.details: Added `server/lib/vibe/ai/tools/connected_app.ex` plus `call_connected_app` wiring in `server/lib/vibe/ai/agent.ex`, `server/lib/vibe/ai/tool_registry.ex`, `server/lib/vibe/ai/standalone_agent.ex`, and `server/lib/vibe/agents.ex`. Standalone agents can now call a configured app-owned HTTPS endpoint using the integration's existing encrypted secret, with allowed actions sourced from `agent_integrations.routing_rules.connected_app`. `mix compile` passed outside the sandbox and `python3 scripts/test_vibe_trade_notification.py --dry-run` still passed.

server_standalone_agent_direct_config_to.details: Patched `server/lib/vibe/ai/agent.ex` with direct `get_current_agent_config` and `update_current_agent_config` tools for prompt/name/status/config reads and edits on the current standalone agent, made those tools always available regardless of `enabled_tools`, and updated the base agent tool guidance to prefer them over `delegate_to_subagent` for one-agent config work. `mix compile` passed and `git diff --check` passed for the touched files.

server_subagent_ephemeral_builder_fast_p.details: Patched `server/lib/vibe/ai/agent_builder.ex` so internal `delegate_task/3` requests bypass the persisted builder session and run an ephemeral builder execution with empty history when there is no builder UI response, and reduced `subagent_mode` runtime budgets to `max_tokens=900` and `max_depth=3`. Also patched `server/lib/vibe/ai/subagent_registry.ex` so delegated builder/integration calls receive `requester_user_id` and the active agent id, avoiding unnecessary rediscovery of the current agent context. `mix compile` passed.

server_live_shop_agent_capability_probe.details: On 2026-04-08, live `POST https://api.vibegram.io/api/agents/bd35d022-ad48-461a-ac44-f09d165a4232/invoke` probes with the provided secret succeeded at the HTTP layer but the agent replied that it does not have a connected-app tool or store analytics/product-management actions. A second probe for monthly visitors/orders produced the same result, confirming the published agent is still running the old trade/general toolset instead of the new shop-connected configuration.

server_builder_code_first_connected_app_.details: Patched `server/lib/vibe/ai/agent_builder.ex` so custom website/app/backend requests now default to a code-side customization path instead of hidden server-side tool mutation. The builder prompt now explicitly offers the code/env setup route first, and the integration payload includes a concrete `connected_app_route_example` plus route/security notes for allowed action ids and `x-vibe-integration-secret` validation.

server_standalone_agent_safe_text_delive.details: Patched `server/lib/vibe/ai/standalone_agent.ex` so standalone-agent chat delivery no longer dereferences `output.mediaUrl` directly on plain text outputs. The DM delivery path now resolves output fields defensively and `mix compile` passed after the change.

server_standalone_agent_attachment_conte.details: Patched `server/lib/vibe_web/channels/chat_channel.ex` and `server/lib/vibe/ai/standalone_agent.ex` so standalone-agent DMs now preserve image/document/audio attachment urls, classify common audio formats as `voice`, and append a compact attachment summary to the current user turn before calling the model. `mix compile` passed after the change and `git diff --check` passed for the touched files.

server_standalone_agent_dm_context_histo.details: Patched `server/lib/vibe_web/channels/chat_channel.ex` to persist an encrypted `agentInputCiphertext` preview only for standalone-agent DMs, and patched `server/lib/vibe/ai/standalone_agent.ex` to reconstruct recent DM context from prior agent plaintext plus decrypted agent-input previews before calling `ChatAgent.stream_response/3`. The standalone system prompt now uses `welcome_message` only for first contact and explicitly avoids repeated self-introductions. `mix compile` passed after the change.

mobile_agent_history_plaintext_merge.details: Patched `mobile/src/lib/ChatStore.ts` so `loadMessages()` normalizes full server message payloads before merge instead of rebuilding a stripped shape that dropped `plaintext`, `plainContent`, `isAgentMessage`, `agentName`, and `agentId`. `git diff --check` passed for the touched files.

mobile_standalone_agent_dm_routing.details: Added `peerAgentId` plumbing through `mobile/app/chat.tsx`, `mobile/app/chatlist.tsx`, `NativeChatMainSurface.tsx`, `NativeChatSurface.tsx`, `ChatNativeMainModule.swift`, `ChatNativeListModule.swift`, `ChatMainView.swift`, `ChatListView.swift`, and `ChatEngine.swift`. The native send path now caches standalone-agent peer ids, bypasses the human-DM friend-key requirement for those chats, and sends `mentionedAgentId` / `agentText` automatically. `xcrun swiftc -parse` passed for the touched Swift files.

mobile_standalone_agent_voice_note_routi.details: Patched `mobile/app/chat.tsx`, `mobile/app/chatlist.tsx`, and `mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatEngine.swift` so voice bubbles sent in standalone-agent DMs keep the exact native voice UI but also include a short `agentText` summary like `User sent a 12-second voice message.` whenever a peer agent id is present. `xcrun swiftc -parse mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatEngine.swift` passed.

server_agent_incoming_chat_toggle.details: Added `Vibe.Agents.incoming_chat_enabled?/1`, surfaced `friendIsAgent`, `friendAgentId`, and `acceptsIncomingChat` in DM chat payloads, exposed `acceptsIncomingChat` on user payloads, added `incoming_chat_enabled` to builder agent cards, and made `ChatChannel` reject DM sends when standalone-agent incoming chat is disabled. `mix compile` passed.

ios_native_agent_incoming_chat_control.details: Extended `ChatListRow.AgentCard` and `ChatNativeAgentConfigPanel.swift` with an `Incoming Chat` control that updates `approval_rules["chat_input"]["enabled"]` while preserving the existing `event_inbox` settings. `xcrun swiftc -parse` passed for the touched Swift files.

server_event_html_normalization.details:
Patched `server/lib/vibe/ai/agent_event_runtime.ex` so event titles, texts, and attachment captions normalize HTML-like markup (``, `
`, closing block tags, common entities, and numeric entities) into plain text before persistence and posting. Followed up by fixing the numeric-entity decoder to call `Regex.replace/4` with the correct `regex, string, replacement` order after a live `/events` request exposed a `FunctionClauseError` on plain titles like `OPEN EURUSD`. `mix compile` passed after the fix.

server_event_inbox_tools_and_batch_mode.details: Added owner-only standalone-agent tools `query_event_inbox` and `configure_event_inbox`, passed `agent_id`/`requester_user_id` through the standalone chat runtime, and added batched summary posting backed by `approval_rules["event_inbox"]` / integration routing rules in `AgentEventRuntime`. `mix compile` passed after the change.

mobile_native_related_message_navigation.details: Parsed related-message metadata into `ChatListRow`, rendered a native inline related-messages card, emitted a `relatedMessagesPressed` event from `ChatListView`, and reused the existing global banner/jump path in `ChatListScreen.tsx`. `xcrun swiftc -parse mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatListViewModels.swift mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatListViewCells.swift mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatListView.swift` passed, and `git diff --check` passed.

external_trade_runtime_vibe_notification.details: Patched `/Users/mohammadshayani/tradeai/trading_robot/config/settings.py` to include `vibe` in `notification_channels`, and patched `/Users/mohammadshayani/tradeai/trading_robot/utils/notifications.py` so `VibeNotifier` defaults to `https://api.vibegram.io`, normalizes a full `/api/agents/...` URL back to the API base, and sends the same `User-Agent` and JSON headers as the working smoke test. `PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/pycache python3 -m py_compile ...` passed.

trade_connected_app_actions_endpoint.details: Added `/Users/mohammadshayani/Desktop/trade/client/app/api/vibe/agent-actions/route.ts`, which validates `x-vibe-integration-secret` and serves the explicit safe actions `app.describe`, `website.summary`, `website.funnel.summary`, `website.live_presence`, `waitlist.summary`, and `engine.usage.summary` using Supabase admin reads with existing in-memory-store fallback. `./node_modules/.bin/eslint app/api/vibe/agent-actions/route.ts` passed in `/Users/mohammadshayani/Desktop/trade/client`.

trade_signal_only_vibe_agent_routing.details: Patched `/Users/mohammadshayani/Desktop/trade/utils/notification_integration.py` so signal generation now emits a compact `signals` notification batch through the Vibe channel, routing signal-only flows through the same agent destination instead of relying on Telegram-only behavior. `git diff --check` passed for the touched trade files and `PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/pycache python3 -m py_compile ...` passed.

trade_vibe_plaintext_notification_render.details:
Patched `/Users/mohammadshayani/Desktop/trade/utils/comprehensive_notifications.py` so the Vibe channel strips HTML tags, converts `
` and block tags into newlines, unescapes entities, and posts plain text to Vibe. `git diff --check` passed and the patched Python files compiled successfully.

server_chat_list_agent_display_name.details: Patched `Vibe.Chat.list_chats_uncached/1` so DM rows whose peer is an agent shadow user now resolve `friendName` from the owning agent `display_name` and prefer the agent avatar for `friendImage`, instead of exposing the shadow username/invoke-style id. `mix compile` passed after the change.

server_mix_test.details: Command failed because server/config/test.exs is missing.

server_mix_compile.details: Compiled successfully after the connected-app bridge patch; only pre-existing warnings were reported.

server_builder_destination_chat_tool.details: Added builder tool `ensure_destination_chat`, shared `Chat.ensure_dm_chat/2`, and DM-only chat resolution so the standalone agent can create/reuse a real attached DM chat and return its chat id.

server_builder_destination_chat_validati.details: Added builder tool `validate_destination_chat` so the standalone agent re-checks live attached/default destination chats, compares a provided chat id against current owner-visible state, repairs stale default destinations when needed, and explains why the same DM id can still be correct.

server_builder_agent_naming.details: The standalone builder now infers a practical creation-time `display_name` from the provided workflow description/persona when the tool input omitted a name, and the builder prompt now requires explicit `display_name` usage for create/rename requests. `mix compile` passed after the backend change.

server_agent_message_push_notifications.details: Patched `AgentEventRuntime` and `GroupAgent` so agent-originated messages now restore deleted chats if needed, broadcast `user:new_message`, and call `Notifications.send_message_push/2` for unmuted participants just like normal user messages. `mix compile` passed after the change.

server_live_event_delivery_debug.details: Live curl to `/api/agents/:identifier/events` returned `200` with `messagePosted: true`; authenticated live GET `/api/chat/73928163c120/messages` and `/api/chats/:user_id` both confirmed the agent event message is present in chat `73928163c120` and that chat is in the owner-visible home list API payload.

server_owner_visible_attached_chats.details: Owner-facing attached/default destination chats now only include chats shared by both the agent shadow user and the owner, preventing the builder from returning invisible-but-writable chat ids.

server_builder_struct_sanitization.details: Builder payload sanitization now compiles with explicit handling for DateTime, NaiveDateTime, Date, Time, Decimal, and fallback structs.

server_agent_secret_endpoint.details: The authenticated GET /api/agents/:id/secret route compiles and returns the decrypted callback signing secret for the owning user.

mobile_git_diff_check.details: git diff --check passed for the modified native agent view, config panel, notes files, and agent secret endpoint files.

mobile_typescript_check.details: `./node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json --pretty false` reports existing repo-wide TypeScript errors outside the touched native agent files, including FlashList typing, NativeChatAppearance shape, old temp files, and relay typing issues.

ios_native_validation.details: The latest `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO` run succeeded from `ios/`, and the built app exists at `~/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData/Vibe-fnzhwyvbbieesmbtzbicdjofxhuo/Build/Products/Debug-iphonesimulator/Vibe.app`. An unsandboxed `xcrun simctl boot` request also succeeded, but the follow-up unsandboxed install/launch requests were rejected, so app launch plus the broader native UI flows (cached secret reuse after agent creation, copy before rotate, the detached glass secret cover, the masked header edge treatment, the secret reveal/copy/rotate flow, the stream failure handling, and the stop button) were not verified in this session.

ios_app_boot_verification.details: Could not complete a full simulator boot/install/launch verification in this session. The latest `xcodebuild -project Vibe.xcodeproj -scheme Vibe -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO` succeeded, the built `.app` exists under `~/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData/Vibe-fnzhwyvbbieesmbtzbicdjofxhuo/Build/Products/Debug-iphonesimulator/Vibe.app`, and an unsandboxed `xcrun simctl boot B8813178-BB99-4D2A-97AD-153E9CD0D7CE` request succeeded, but the follow-up unsandboxed `simctl install` / `simctl launch` requests were rejected.

ios_native_home_debug_logging.details: Added targeted native logging to ChatNativeHomeModule.fetchChats, ChatNativeHomeListView.setRows/didChange, and ChatEngine.postChangeLocked. `xcrun swiftc -parse` passed for the touched Swift files and `git diff --check` passed for the touched mobile files.

ios_native_agent_config_rename.details: The native standalone agent config panel now exposes a `Name` row that opens a native rename alert and saves through `PUT /api/agents/:id`. `xcrun swiftc -parse mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatNativeAgentConfigPanel.swift mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatListViewModels.swift` passed.

ios_native_agent_prompt_edit_control.details: Patched `mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatNativeAgentConfigPanel.swift` so the `Prompt` row always appears, shows a condensed preview, opens an editable native prompt editor, and saves `system_prompt` through `PUT /api/agents/:id`. `xcrun swiftc -parse mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatNativeAgentConfigPanel.swift mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatListViewModels.swift` passed, and `git diff --check -- mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatNativeAgentConfigPanel.swift` passed.

ios_native_agent_inbox_mode_control.details: Extended agent cards with `event_inbox_mode` / `summary_window_hours`, surfaced an `Inbox Mode` row in `ChatNativeAgentConfigPanel.swift`, and wired it to `PUT /api/agents/:id` with `approval_rules["event_inbox"]` choices for event bubbles, 4h batch summaries, and daily summaries. `xcrun swiftc -parse mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatListViewModels.swift mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatNativeAgentConfigPanel.swift mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatNativeAgentView.swift` passed, and `mix compile` passed.

web_agent_config_docs_route.details: Added a dedicated web doc page at `client/src/pages/AgentConfigDocs.tsx`, routed it through `client/src/App.tsx` at `/docs/agents/config`, updated the shared docs header to handle config-doc anchors, and linked the main agent docs page into the new config reference.

web_agent_docs_sidebar_suite.details: Reworked the standalone agent docs into a sidebar-driven docs shell with focused pages for overview, config, examples, and env/setup. Added `client/src/components/docs/DocsShell.tsx`, `client/src/pages/AgentExamplesDocs.tsx`, `client/src/pages/AgentEnvDocs.tsx`, `client/src/pages/agentDocsShared.ts`, rewired `client/src/App.tsx`, and replaced `client/src/pages/AgentDocs.css` with the new sidebar/scroll layout.

web_client_bundle_for_phoenix_root.details: Updated the root `Dockerfile` to build the React client in a Node stage and copy `client/dist` into `server/priv/static` before the Phoenix release build. Re-ran `npm run build` and `npm run build -- --outDir ../server/priv/static` from `client/`, both of which succeeded and regenerated the landing/docs bundle for the Phoenix-served root.

mobile_chatstore_realtime_reload_logging.details: Added unconditional ChatStore logs for `user:new_chat`, `user:new_message`, forced `scheduleLoadChats`, and `loadChats(forceRemote)` cache-bypass decisions so the next device run will show whether realtime is triggering the remote `/chats` refresh path.

mobile_chatstore_cached_start_reconcile.details: When cached chats already exist, `loadChats()` now schedules one short background remote reconciliation instead of only returning the hydrated list forever. Starting any real remote reload clears the pending timer and refresh cooldown to avoid duplicate fetches. `git diff --check -- mobile/src/lib/ChatStore.ts` passed, and `./node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json --pretty false` still fails only with pre-existing repo-wide errors outside `ChatStore.ts`.

mobile_saved_messages_media_placeholder_.details: Patched `mobile/app/saved-messages.tsx` so saved image/video/voice/location rows no longer inject placeholder text like `Image` or `Video`, existing saved-media placeholders are suppressed in the row mapper/render path, and `mobile/src/native/chat/types.ts` now declares `bubbleThemGradient` to match existing chat appearance usage. `get_errors` reported no errors in the touched files after the change.

ios_native_chat_timestamp_parser_scroll_.details: Patched `mobile/src/native/chat/mapper.ts` to normalize native row timestamps back to `HH:mm`, updated `ChatListViewCells.swift` to use `ChatNativeAgentTextRenderer` for agent and mention bubble text, softened the main header blur/mask in `ChatMainView.swift`, forced bottom scroll for pending sends plus resize-safe inset ordering in `ChatListView.swift`, and skipped redundant inset rewrites in `ChatNativeHomeListView.swift`. `xcrun swiftc -parse` passed for the touched Swift files, `get_errors` reported no file-level errors, and `git diff --check` passed for the touched files.

ios_native_chat_block_renderer_link_prev.details: Patched `mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatListViewCells.swift`, `ChatListView.swift`, `ChatNativeAgentStreamingText.swift`, and `ChatNativeAgentMessagesView.swift` so main-chat agent bubbles now render fenced code blocks with `AgentCodeBlockView`, default text bubbles use the shared markdown/link renderer, external text links render a cached fixed-height native preview card via `LPMetadataProvider`, and code-block expansion invalidates the list layout while preserving scroll position. `xcrun swiftc -parse` passed for the touched Swift files and `get_errors` reported no file-level errors.

ios_native_agent_code_block_storage_key_.details: Fixed `AgentCodeBlockView.isExpanded(...)` in `mobile/modules/vibe-chat-native/ios/ChatNativeAgentStreamingText.swift` by qualifying the static helper call as `Self.storageKey(...)` so the `storageKey` parameter no longer shadows the helper and triggers `Cannot call value of non-function type 'String?'`. `xcrun swiftc -parse` passed and `get_errors` reported no file-level errors after the patch.
